channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marco Rubio praises Karoline Leavitt as ‘irreplaceable’ while covering for her as White House Press Secretary during maternity leave
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio has expressed his anticipation for the return of White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt following her maternity leave. Leavitt, who has served in the role since th...

item.title: My Chemical Romance to Release Deluxe Edition of 'Danger Days' with Bonus Tracks and Remastered Artwork
item.description: My Chemical Romance have announced a deluxe edition of their final album 'Danger Days: The True Lives of the Fabulous Killjoys', set to release on 10th July via Reprise/Warner Records. The reissue wil...

item.title: D.C. Driver Sentenced to 10 Years After Deadly Birthday Party Crash
item.description: A driver from Washington, D.C., Sunday Joseph, received a 10-year prison sentence after a tragic incident last year in Bladensburg, Maryland. Joseph crashed his vehicle into a tent at a child's outdoo...

item.title: Gloria Holliday Photographed With Easter Bunny for CBS Radio Show Promotion in 1951
item.description: In 1951, Gloria Holliday, an actress and singer, appeared regularly on CBS Radio's situation comedy 'The Harold Peary Show,' also known as 'Honest Harold.' She portrayed Gloria, a switchboard operator...

item.title: Case Involving Arvind Kejriwal to Be Heard by Different Judicial Bench
item.description: The ongoing legal proceedings concerning Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal have seen a recent development, where a judge has announced that another bench will take up the case for hearing. This dec...

item.description: Pakistan has successfully raised $250 million equivalent through its very first Panda bond issuance in the Chinese onshore capital market, signalling the country’s initial entry into one of the world’...

item.title: South Africa’s Struggle with Hypertension Control
item.description: High blood pressure remains one of the leading contributors to stroke, heart disease, kidney failure, and premature death in South Africa. While awareness of hypertension is important, the real proble...

item.title: Princess of Wales observes innovative teaching methods at Italian nursery
item.description: The Princess of Wales recently visited a nursery in Italy to gain insight into innovative teaching methods being applied in early childhood education. During her visit, she observed various educationa...

item.title: Robert Downey Jr. in 'Heart and Souls' (1993): Behind the Scenes and Iconic Performance

item.title: All Close Contacts of Hantavirus Cases in France and Netherlands Test Negative
item.description: Authorities in France and the Netherlands have confirmed that all individuals identified as close contacts of hantavirus cases linked to the MV Hondius cruise ship have tested negative for the virus. ...

item.title: Government Implements Mwamkulu Irrigation Scheme to Enhance Rice and Maize Farming in Mpanda
item.description: The Tanzanian government is actively working on the Mwamkulu irrigation scheme in Mpanda Municipality, Katavi Region, investing a total of TZS 33.9 billion to boost agricultural productivity. The proj...

item.title: Affordable Spring Craft Kits for Kids Under $25
item.description: Spring is a perfect time to encourage creativity in children, and thankfully there are plenty of craft kits available that won't break the bank. This article highlights 17 craft kits priced under $25,...

item.title: King Charles III meets victims and community in Golders Green following stabbings
item.description: King Charles III visited Golders Green to meet the victims of last month's stabbings, demonstrating his support for the Jewish community and expressing concern over the rise in antisemitism. He visite...

item.title: 14-Year-Old Manitoba Student Faces Murder Conspiracy Charges Over Alleged School Attack Plot
item.description: A 14-year-old student from Rivers, Manitoba, has been charged with conspiracy to commit murder, counselling the offence of murder, and two counts of uttering threats, following an alleged plan to atta...

item.title: How Indoor Plants Can Improve Mood and Reduce Winter Stress
item.description: As winter sets in and daylight dwindles, many people experience a dip in mood commonly known as the 'winter blues'. Clinical psychotherapist Dan Auerbach explains that bringing plants indoors can be a...
